name: Lost Estate Agent
short_description: Lost Estate Agent - is a survival horror game a real atmosphere of abandoned mansion.
detailed_description:
Welcome to the abandoned mansion!


You are a regular real estate agent sent to retrieve documents in a sinister mansion.
But right from the start, dangerous adventures await you.
However, you will meet a friendly cat and a master zombie who are always ready to help.

This is a first-person horror survival game with standard controls: keyboard and mouse.
Here, you need to run, hide, and search for provisions to return home.

Game Features:

  • Simple and pleasant controls.
  • The atmosphere of an abandoned mansion.
  • Good optimization.
  • Interesting storyline.
  • Stylized graphics.
  • There are achievements and cloud saving.
